parameters.apprise_url_plus: exotel://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.sid_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Exotel destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise exotel:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into an Exotel SMS API form body and post it to api.exotel.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: From=${ customer_secrets.EXOTEL_SMS_FROM }&To=${ customer_secrets.EXOTEL_SMS_TO }&Body={* ((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Exotel number (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Exotel destinations, direct

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Exotel from phone

sid_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Exotel sid

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Exotel token
